name: Check Point Harmony Endpoint
description: Integrates with Check Point Harmony Endpoint Management API for endpoint security, anti-malware scanning, computer isolation, and remediation operations

actions.name: List Computers
actions.description: Retrieve the list of managed computers with filtering by status, type, and group

parameters.name: computer_types
parameters.description: Filter by computer type (desktop, laptop, server)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of computers to return

actions.name: Get Computer Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific computer by its ID

parameters.name: computer_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the computer

actions.name: Isolate Computer
actions.description: Isolate one or more computers by denying all network access except to Check Point services

parameters.name: computer_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of computer IDs to isolate

parameters.name: computer_names
parameters.description: JSON array of computer names to isolate

parameters.name: computer_ips
parameters.description: JSON array of computer IP addresses to isolate

actions.name: Deisolate Computer
actions.description: Remove network isolation from one or more previously isolated computers

parameters.name: computer_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of computer IDs to deisolate

parameters.name: computer_names
parameters.description: JSON array of computer names to deisolate

actions.name: Scan Computers
actions.description: Perform anti-malware scans on computers matching the given filter criteria

parameters.name: computer_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of computer IDs to scan

parameters.name: computer_names
parameters.description: JSON array of computer names to scan

parameters.name: computer_ips
parameters.description: JSON array of computer IPs to scan

actions.name: Get Remediation Status
actions.description: Retrieve the current status of all remediation operations or a specific one

parameters.name: operation_id
parameters.description: Specific remediation operation ID (optional, returns all if not specified)

actions.name: Get Remediation Results
actions.description: Retrieve the results of a completed remediation operation

parameters.name: operation_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the remediation operation

actions.name: List Policy Rules
actions.description: Retrieve the list of endpoint security policy rules with metadata

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return

actions.name: Get Rule Details
actions.description: Retrieve the metadata and settings of a specific policy rule

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the policy rule

actions.name: Install Policy
actions.description: Push and install the current policy to all managed endpoints
